title: Alhamd Alkhayat
compiled_truth: Alhamd Alkhayat is an Enron employee at [Enron](companies/enron). Over the corpus period (2000-06-25 to 2001-11-10), Alhamd Alkhayat sent 32 and received 104 emails, totalling 136 interactions. Top correspondents: [Jeff Skilling](people/jeff-skilling) (9), [Steven Kean](people/steven-kean) (8), [Greg Whalley](people/greg-whalley) (5), [Margaret Carson](people/margaret-carson) (4), [Rob Bradley](people/rob-bradley) (4). Mailbox folders observed: discussion_threads, inbox.
